mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM comic WHERE deleted = 0
AND comic_name LIKE '%' || #{comicName} || '%'
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM comic WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comic (comic_name, project_id, description, cover_image, chapter_count, status, create_user_id) VALUES (#{comicName}, #{projectId}, #{description}, #{coverImage}, #{chapterCount}, #{status}, #{createUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE comic SET comic_name = #{comicName}, project_id = #{projectId}, description = #{description}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, chapter_count = #{chapterCount}, status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE comic SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
